heading: Brewers procuring beer from other brewers
label: 5413 Brewers procuring beer from other brewers
text: A brewer, under such regulations as the Secretary shall prescribe, may obtain beer in his own hogsheads, barrels, and kegs, marked with his name and address, from another brewer, with taxpayment thereof to be by the producer in the manner prescribed by section 5054.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5413, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 675Pub. L. 85–859
Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
